exec: pm.test('Response has accessToken', function() {var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data.data).to.have.property('accessToken');});
pm.test('Response has sessionId', function() {var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data.data).to.have.property('sessionId'); pm.environment.set('session_id', data.data.sessionId);});
pm.test('Response has user', function() {var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data.data).to.have.property('user');});
pm.test('Save access token', function() {var data = pm.response.json(); pm.environment.set('access_token', data.data.accessToken);});
pm.test('Admin login returns access token', function() {var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data.data).to.have.property('accessToken');});
pm.test('Refresh returns new accessToken', function() {var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data.data).to.have.property('accessToken');});
pm.test('Update access token', function() {var data = pm.response.json(); pm.environment.set('access_token', data.data.accessToken);});
pm.test('Response contains user email', function() {var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data.data).to.have.property('email');});
pm.test('Response is an array', function() {var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data.data).to.be.an('array');});
pm.test('Response contains log array', function() {var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data.data).to.be.an('array');});
pm.test('Error code is FORBIDDEN', function() {var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data.error.code).to.equal('FORBIDDEN');});
pm.test('Error code is INVALID_CREDENTIALS', function() {var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data.error.code).to.equal('INVALID_CREDENTIALS');});
